title: RuleCategory
description: A category grouping for Workflow Analyzer rules. The code is used as the category segment in rule IDs (e.g. CPRIMA-T-001).

code.description: Short uppercase code used in rule IDs. Ideally one character, maximum four.

description.description: One-line description of what rules in this category check.

includes.description: Concerns explicitly covered by this category.

excludes.description: Concerns explicitly outside this category, to prevent overlap with adjacent categories.
